mapper.sql: select tss.ter_sn, tss.sensor_type, tss.data_status as data_status, tss.diagnosis_update_time as sensor_diagnosis_update_time, ti.upc, ti.gateway, ti.hop_count as hop_count, ti.online_status as ter_online_status, ti.rssi as ter_rssi, ti.diagnosis_update_time ter_diagnosis_update_time, bi.id as building_id, bi.name as building_name, bfi.floor_name, bfi.id as floor_id, bpi.id as point_id, bpi.point_name, bpi.block, bpi.zone, bpi.zone_sub, tg.wifi_ssid, tg.wifi_type, tg.rssi as gateway_rssi, tg.channel, tg.online_status as gateway_online_status, tg.diagnosis_update_time gateway_diagnosis_update_time from ter_sensor_status tss left join ter_info ti on (ti.sn = tss.ter_sn) left join ter_building_point_info tbpi on (tss.ter_sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (tbpi.point_id = bpi.id) left join building_floor_info bfi on (bpi.floor_id = bfi.id) left join building_info bi on (bpi.building_id = bi.id) left join ter_gateway tg on (tg.sn = ti.gateway) inner join sys_dept d on (bi.dept_id = d.dept_id)

select tss.ter_sn, tss.sensor_type, tss.data_status as data_status, tss.diagnosis_update_time as sensor_diagnosis_update_time, ti.upc, ti.gateway, ti.hop_count as hop_count, ti.online_status as ter_online_status, ti.rssi as ter_rssi, ti.diagnosis_update_time ter_diagnosis_update_time, bi.id as building_id, bi.name as building_name, bfi.floor_name, bfi.id as floor_id, bpi.id as point_id, bpi.point_name, bpi.block, bpi.zone, bpi.zone_sub, tg.wifi_ssid, tg.wifi_type, tg.rssi as gateway_rssi, tg.channel, tg.online_status as gateway_online_status, tg.diagnosis_update_time gateway_diagnosis_update_time from ter_sensor_extend_status tss left join ter_info ti on (ti.sn = tss.ter_sn) left join ter_building_point_info tbpi on (tss.ter_sn = tbpi.ter_sn) left join building_point_info bpi on (tbpi.point_id = bpi.id) left join building_floor_info bfi on (bpi.floor_id = bfi.id) left join building_info bi on (bpi.building_id = bi.id) left join ter_gateway tg on (tg.sn = ti.gateway) inner join sys_dept d on (bi.dept_id = d.dept_id)
mapper.update: update ter_info set online_status = '0', diagnosis_update_time=now() where sn = #{terSn} and online_status = '1'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ter_sensor_extend_status (ter_sn, sensor_type, data_status, diagnosis_update_time) VALUES
(#{terSn}, #{item}, '1', now())
